messages: Outstanding day! Your spine alignment was exceptionally stable and balanced.
Champion posture! You kept your upper back supported and took all your standing breaks.
Exceptional work today! Your core engagement is setting a new gold standard.
Flawless alignment! Your back rest is thanking you for the even distribution.
Great job today! You maintained solid alignment for the majority of your session.
Solid effort! You're building healthy habits with consistent back support.
Well done! You kept slouching to a minimum and responded quickly to haptic alerts.
Good posture score! A few more standing breaks will push you into the excellent zone.
A decent session, but watch out for slouching as fatigue sets in.
You had moderate support today. Try to sit all the way back in your seat.
Focus on your shoulders tomorrow—they tended to hunched forward in the afternoon.
A step in the right direction. Let's aim to get those standing breaks up tomorrow.
Today was tough on your spine. Let's make tomorrow a fresh start for alignment.
You spent a significant amount of time leaning forward. Remember your lumbar support.
Your haptic correction rate was low today. Try resetting your posture when alerted.
Frequent slouching detected. Consider adjusting your screen height to help keep you upright.

improved: Great job! Your core engagement was {pct}% more stable today than yesterday!
Progress! You reduced your total slouching time by {pct}% compared to yesterday.
Fantastic improvement! You completed {pct}% more standing breaks today.
You responded to haptic warnings {pct}% faster today. Your muscle memory is growing!
declined: Your alignment score dropped by {pct}% today. Rest up and reset tomorrow.
You spent {pct}% more time slouching today. Try raising your monitor height.
Standing break compliance was down {pct}%. Let's prioritize those breaks tomorrow.

left_leaning: Symmetry Alert: You leaned heavily toward your left shoulder today. Try centering yourself.
Noticeable left-side tilt detected. Check if your elbow rests are aligned.
right_leaning: Symmetry Alert: You leaned heavily toward your right shoulder today. Try centering yourself.
Noticeable right-side tilt detected. Check if your elbow rests are aligned.
low_lumbar_contact: Your bottom was slid too far forward today. Keep your hips touching the back of the chair.
Lumbar support was frequently lost. Slide back in your seat to re-engage the lumbar sensor.
high_break_compliance: Standing break superstar! Your regular mobility breaks are protecting your spine.
Perfect break compliance! Your active recovery is keeping your muscles refreshed.
low_break_compliance: Stuck in your chair? Remember, taking a 3-minute stand every hour is crucial.
Try not to ignore the standing alerts. Even a brief stretch keeps your energy up.
